title: Influenza weekly reports: 2023 - 2024 season - Canada.ca
content:
## Influenza weekly reports: 2023 - 2024 season
- Canadian respiratory virus surveillance report
- Non-interactive reports from the 2023 - 2024 season

## Canadian respiratory virus surveillance report
The FluWatch+ Surveillance Program has launched an interactive dashboard. This dashboard provides a weekly overview of key trends on the activity of respiratory viruses, such as influenza (flu), COVID-19 and respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) in Canada. Historical reports are available in the archives section of the current page below.
View interactive dashboard
